'''Josala Krenn''' was the partner of [[Kroddok Stopa]] and an [[Archaeology/Legends|archaeologist]] with the [[Obroan Institute for Archaeology]]. She along with her partner were sent to [[Brath Qella]] to excavate the [[Qella]] culture in order to learn more about the ''[[Teljkon Vagabond]]''. They would land on the ice-covered planet, and using a Mark II World Rover, would begin preparing equipment to extract samples. Unfortunately, while drilling, the machine triggered a massive avalanche, which would kill both Krenn and Stopa. When the team on the ''[[Penga Rift]]'' landed weeks later, the glacier in which their bodies were found was named in their honor.
